overall.description: First-person exploration through Night City in Cyberpunk 2077, walking through neon-lit alleys and elevated walkways at night. The journey transitions from a covered commercial courtyard through cherry blossom-lined pedestrian streets, up stairs to an open terrace with panoramic skyline views, and finally into dark narrow back alleys illuminated by red neon lights.

agents.ego_description: walking through a covered commercial courtyard with concrete platforms and overhead industrial structures

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'TASTY' advertisement with colorful graphics
large concrete block structures forming seating or barriers in the courtyard
network of industrial pipes and ductwork running overhead
blue illuminated vending or arcade machine with glowing interface

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered commercial courtyard with concrete structures and industrial overhead piping. Large digital billboards and vending machines line the walkway as the camera moves steadily forward through the sheltered space.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian alley with cherry blossoms and Japanese restaurants

events.description: exits covered courtyard into narrow pedestrian alley lined with cherry blossom trees

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow pedestrian alley lined with illuminated cherry blossom trees and red paper lanterns

entered.detail: trees with pink illuminated cherry blossoms forming a canopy over the alley
traditional red Japanese paper lanterns hanging overhead
restaurant storefront with bright neon signage reading 'TASTY DELIGHTS'
neon sign for 'OKIE GRILL & SUSHI HOUSE' with weapon graphics

segments.scene_description: Transitioning from the covered courtyard, the scene opens into a charming narrow pedestrian alley decorated with illuminated cherry blossom trees and traditional red paper lanterns. Neon signs for restaurants like 'Tasty Delights' and 'Okie Grill' line the path as the camera proceeds down the tiled walkway.

scene_state.functional_zone: concrete stairway transition to elevated walkway

events.description: begins ascending concrete staircase between buildings

agents.ego_description: walking up a flight of concrete stairs flanked by building facades

entered.detail: neon sign reading 'Snapped Synapse - Roasters' above a doorway
wide concrete stairs leading upward between buildings

segments.scene_description: The path leads to a concrete staircase ascending between buildings, marked by the 'Snapped Synapse Roasters' neon sign. As the camera climbs the stairs, the cherry blossom alley falls behind and glimpses of the Night City skyline begin to appear above.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated terrace with panoramic Night City views

events.description: emerges from stairway onto elevated open terrace with panoramic view of Night City skyline

agents.ego_description: walking along an elevated terrace with expansive views of the Night City skyline and neon skyscrapers

entered.detail: panoramic view of towering skyscrapers with red and white neon illumination against night sky
massive digital screen displaying advertisements on building facade
concrete bench with graffiti on an elevated platform
metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated walkway

segments.scene_description: Emerging onto an expansive elevated terrace, the scene reveals a breathtaking panoramic view of the Night City skyline with towering neon-lit skyscrapers. The camera proceeds along the walkway past a graffiti-covered concrete bench, with the vast urban landscape stretching into the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow winding passages between commercial buildings

events.description: turns from open terrace into narrower winding passages between buildings
descends from elevated walkway to street level

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow winding passages and descending from the elevated terrace

notable_agents.action: person in red clothing walking ahead in the narrow passage

entered.detail: neon sign reading 'dima buzz' in green and white
tight walls of adjacent buildings creating a narrow corridor

segments.scene_description: Leaving the open terrace behind, the camera turns into narrower winding passages between buildings, passing the 'dima buzz' neon sign. The path descends from the elevated walkway, encountering a pedestrian in red clothing ahead as it navigates the tighter urban corridors.

scene_state.functional_zone: dark narrow back alley with red neon lighting

events.description: enters darker alley with dominant red neon lighting and high walls

agents.ego_description: walking through a very narrow dark back alley illuminated by red and green neon lights

entered.detail: intense red neon lighting illuminating the narrow alley walls
tall dark building walls creating a claustrophobic corridor

segments.scene_description: The final segment descends into a very narrow dark back alley where red neon lights cast an intense glow on the surrounding walls. The space becomes increasingly claustrophobic as the camera proceeds through the sheltered corridor, with only the neon illumination cutting through the darkness.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey that transitions from a sheltered industrial courtyard into a vibrant pedestrian district before ascending to a panoramic skyline view and descending into a claustrophobic neon alley. It begins within a semi-covered commercial space characterized by concrete structures and overhead piping, moving steadily forward past digital billboards and vending machines. As the camera exits the shelter, the environment shifts into a charming pedestrian alley lined with illuminated cherry blossom trees and red paper lanterns, eventually leading to a concrete staircase that climbs toward the city skyline. The scene then opens onto an expansive elevated terrace revealing a breathtaking panorama of towering neon skyscrapers before turning away from the vista into winding passages and descending past a pedestrian in red. Finally, the path narrows into a dark, sheltered back alley where intense red neon lights cast a glow over the walls, creating an increasingly claustrophobic atmosphere.
